---
title: "Data Science Resources"
subtitle: "A collection of useful, freely-available data science resources and links, curated by [Nicola Rennie](https://nrennie.rbind.io/)."
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## This page has moved

Please see the updated page at [nrennie.rbind.io/resources/data-science](https://nrennie.rbind.io/resources/data-science/).
:::
